channel.title: Home on tomasverheyen
channel.description: Recent content in Home on tomasverheyen

item.title: Hello Blog!
item.description: I plan to keep these blogs more technical, about programming and engineering, with tutorials.

item.title: Gallery
item.description:
Welcome to the Gallery!

This gallery is in a chronological order (newest top, oldest bottom)

Click on the images to view them.

If you wish to use any of these images in other media, posters or games, please let me know! I’ll be happy to provide you with the higher resolution versions.

Sunflowers (June 16, 2026)

This practice was done in an afternoon, withnin ~4 hours.

First time using non-default Krita brushes, and wow what a diffrence can brushes make when you know where tu use them. I’ve always used the round waterbrush, it was great for smooth surfaces, like scupltures, but I’ve quite struggeled to paint textured materials since the round brush is not the right tool for that job.
